ALMU.thesis: Indium phosphide quantum-dot photonic ICs, picks-and-shovels substrate for the next generation of optical interconnect

ANET.thesis: Ethernet backbone for AI, $3.25B AI revenue, cloud switching dominance

ARM.thesis: IP toll on every non-x86 AI chip, v9 royalty rate 2x v8, hyperscaler share approaching 50%, royalty annuity model

ASTS.thesis: Satellite direct-to-cell connectivity. Q1 2026 missed revenue 60% (FY guide reaffirmed). 50 sh held. Adjacent Tech sleeve.

CIFR.thesis: Bitcoin miner pivoting to AI hosting, Datacenter layer pivot bet, sub-$1B cost basis entry

CRDO.thesis: Everyone fights over the GPU; Credo sells the wires between them, tripled revenue to $1.335B with 68% GM and guides 80%+ for FY27

LPKFF.thesis: The German laser company drilling the glass substrates AI chip packaging moves to next

MU.thesis: HBM is the AI bottleneck, sold out through 2026, only US-domiciled supplier of three globally

NBIS.thesis: GPU cloud infrastructure with $19.4B Microsoft + $27B Meta backlog. ~$46B locked, total backlog approaching $50B.

OSS.thesis: The rugged box for AI in the field: 55% revenue growth, 1.8x book-to-bill, zero debt, turning itself into a defense-AI supplier in real time

OUST.thesis: Lidar + cameras + full perception stack for robotics. REV8 launched. Adjacent Tech sleeve, NOT Physical Layer.

PENG.thesis: The memory floor and the AI factory in one ticker, Micron and Nebius holding hands

RKLB.thesis: Launch + space components. Neutron H2'26 catalyst. Adjacent Tech sleeve, NOT Physical Layer.

SILC.thesis: First AI-inference production order landing on a recovering core, a 5.4M-share float, net cash worth a quarter of the cap, and $0.55 of EPS torque per $10M of revenue

WYY.thesis: A $126M certified federal-identity microcap riding the zero-trust mandate, up from under $3 to $13 and still uncovered

XNDU.thesis: Only public photonic quantum pure-play. Room-temperature qubits on fiber. DARPA + Lockheed + AMD customers. 5-year thesis.

ASML.thesis: EUV lithography monopoly, EUR 38.8B backlog, irreplaceable

AVAV.thesis: Most important drone company, Switchblade proven in Ukraine, revenue +143%

AVGO.thesis: Custom AI silicon for Google TPU + Meta MTIA + ~90% Ethernet switch share. Dual-layer position.

BE.thesis: Solid oxide fuel cells for behind-the-meter datacenter power, paired with VST as the Power & Grid layer's two-path bet

BN.thesis: World's premier infrastructure capital allocator, $180B deployable, 5000MW power

CEG.thesis: Largest US nuclear fleet, 20yr Microsoft + Meta contracts, beneficiary of AI power demand

COHR.thesis: 25% optical transceiver market share, NVIDIA $2B partnership

FN.thesis: Don't buy the optical stock, buy the Thai factory that physically builds the 800G and 1.6T transceivers for all of them at 5x sales

IREN.thesis: Bitcoin miner pivoting to AI, $9.7B Microsoft contract, 3GW power

KTOS.thesis: Autonomous combat drones, Valkyrie program of record

LITE.thesis: Only 200G/lane EML supplier at volume, NVIDIA $2B deal

LPTH.thesis: Infrared optical components for defense and AI-adjacent imaging. Freeform optics moat, Visimid IR thermal module acquisition, pivoting from commercial to defense revenue.

MBLY.thesis: 70% ADAS market share, Intel forced selling creating artificial discount, $1.7B cash

MOD.thesis: Fastest growing cooling stock, data center revenue +119%, cheapest cooling valuation

MRVL.thesis: AI revenue $2.5B+, acquired Celestial AI for photonics, data center 75% of revenue

NOW.thesis: Enterprise automation platform, AI agents for IT

OKLO.thesis: Sam Altman-backed SMR, first-mover in advanced fission microreactors

ON.thesis: Analog + power chips for EV and AI infrastructure

PANW.thesis: Leading cybersecurity platformization, next-gen security ARR $6.3B

PLTR.thesis: AI software platform, 82% gross margins, government + commercial

POET.thesis: Silicon photonics for optical interconnects, TSMC partnership

PPSI.thesis: The purest 'AI ran out of power and the grid can't keep up' bet I found, on-site megawatts in 6 months instead of years

SITM.thesis: The clock is the bottleneck nobody prices: 395 people, revenue +88%, datacenter segment +158% with seven straight triple-digit quarters, and a Renesas deal that roughly doubles the company

TLN.thesis: 17-year $18B AWS contract, lowest valuation in power sector at 19x forward PE

TSEM.thesis: Silicon photonics revenue doubled, $920M SiPho buildout

VRT.thesis: Gold standard AI cooling, $15B backlog, thermal bottleneck pure-play

VST.thesis: Largest US nuclear fleet outside CEG. 20-year Microsoft + Meta PPAs locking long-dated capacity.

WOLF.thesis: The 800-volt AI datacenter runs on silicon carbide, Wolfspeed owns the substrate layer at ~33.7% share, and Chapter 11 handed over the franchise with 70% of the debt erased
